coverage_tiers.title: Sports Data Soccer API - Coverage Tiers and Types

coverage_types.Lineups: Delivers the lineup player names per match
coverage_types.Match Events Premium: Delivers formations, assists, penalty shootout scorers
coverage_types.Match Stats: Basic performance data including shots, free-kicks, and corners with x/y coordinates
coverage_types.Player Stats: Live performance data including passes, tackles, and clearances with x/y coordinates
coverage_types.Touches Pro & Video Sync: Full check of collection, additional data points and millisecond timestamps

1.name: Post-Match Data — Score
1.timing: Opta: Within 1 hour. Sports Data API: Different intervals

2.name: Post-Match Data — Scorers
2.description: Post-match result of the match and goal scorers
2.timing: Opta: Within 1 hour. Sports Data API: Different intervals

3.name: Post-Match Data — Line-ups and Basic Events
3.description: Post-match result of the match and goal scorers, with line-ups and basic events
3.timing: Opta: Within 1 hour. Sports Data API: Different intervals

6.name: Live — Line-ups and Basic Events (post-match)

7.name: Live — Line-ups and Basic Events (live scorers)
7.description: Live scores with goal scorers. Post-match line-ups, bookings, and substitutions. Note: Basic stats will be added for few competitions.

8.name: Live — Line-ups, Basic Stats and Basic Events

9.name: Live — Line-ups, Basic Stats and Basic Events Premium
9.description: Tier 8 + formations, assists, and penalty shootout scorers

10.name: Live — Line-ups and Basic Events + Non-Live SSTZ
